notes:
• Arbitrator mode — draft the award and cite the parties' submissions by paragraph/page (full with date first, short after), in the seat's language
• Hyperlinked e-Brief — combine exhibits into one bookmarked PDF with a clickable index
• Chronology — a dated matter timeline; pull in dated exhibits, export CSV
• Document People + References tabs — link persons to a document and auto-detect the exhibits it cites
• Redaction — true black-out that flattens the page so the text can't be recovered
• Named citation presets (ICC, ICSID, German, Swiss …) and bulk tagging
